mission.title: Install and Configure SlimFaas on Kubernetes
mission.description: SlimFaas is a lightweight, plug-and-play Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) platform for Kubernetes. It scales functions to zero and back up on demand, with built-in pub/sub (sync and async) and a consensus layer for high availability.

steps.title: Deploy SlimFaas on Kubernetes
steps.description:
Install SlimFaas from the official manifests:
```bash
kubectl create namespace slimfaas
kubectl apply -n slimfaas -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AxaFrance/slimfaas/main/demo/deployment-slimfaas.yml
```

steps.title: Deploy a sample function
steps.description:
Deploy a sample function with SlimFaas annotations:
```bash
kubectl apply -n slimfaas -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AxaFrance/slimfaas/main/demo/deployment-functions.yml
```

steps.title: Test the function
steps.description:
Port-forward and invoke the function:
```bash
kubectl port-forward svc/slimfaas -n slimfaas 5000:5000
curl http://localhost:5000/function/fibonacci/invoke -d '{"input": 10}'
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n slimfaas
kubectl get svc -n slimfaas
```

resolution.summary: SlimFaas is deployed as a lightweight FaaS platform with scale-to-zero capability.

troubleshooting.title: Function not scaling
troubleshooting.description:
Check the SlimFaas annotations on the function deployment:
```bash
kubectl describe deployment -n slimfaas
```

troubleshooting.title: Scale to zero not working
troubleshooting.description: Verify the `SlimFaas/Function` annotation is set on the function deployment.

prerequisites.description: A Kubernetes cluster with a default StorageClass (for PersistentVolumeClaims), kubectl, and git.
